text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, May 18. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: The kitchen sink area has a problem. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Let's get that resolved. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. That's a big step. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: I've got the grocery list ready. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Reading a new book before bed. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! I can help troubleshoot that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: I've got the schedule covered. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Let's organize the menu. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: Setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Good way to wrap up the day. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Having dinner with our friends tonight. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Social breaks are great. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
